title: pilosella stenosoma subsp. suprafloccosa
intro: Pilosella stenosoma subsp. suprafloccosa is a rare plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, specifically a subspecies of the Pilosella stenosoma. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, colds, and respiratory issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions, including bronchitis and sore throats. Pilosella stenosoma subsp. suprafloccosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
